Internal Compliance Memo — DunesPay PJSC (ADX: DNPJ) — contact: compliance@dunespay.example
Subject: PDPL and market abuse assessment for “Project Sand Falcon” (potential acquisition of Marhaba Finserv Ltd, ADGM CL‑9 1 4 2 2‑AD).
The draft board term sheet dated 28 May 2026 (purchase price AED 410–460m; sukuk bridge financing) is non‑public and, per SCA Market Conduct and ADX Disclosure Manual, constitutes inside information until binding approval.
Disclosure timing: lodge an ADX e‑Disclosure immediately upon board resolution and before the next trading session; simultaneously notify SCA via eServices; do not brief analysts or lenders beyond wall‑crossed lists.
Selective disclosure controls: pre‑sounding under NDA with Al Faraj Capital PSC and Noor Crescent Takaful PJSC may proceed only after recording each wall‑crossed individual on the insider list; avoid non‑deal roadshow references to deal economics.
Closed period: we are in ADX’s trading blackout from 15 days pre‑Q2 end until financials are posted; in addition, impose a transaction‑specific blackout on all deal team members under the Insider Dealing Policy.
Public‑status note: our 12‑May‑2026 ADX filing (https://www.adx.ae/announcements?id=R-2026-0441-FJ) announcing a strategic review is public and stale; it does not render the current pricing, funding, or counterparty identity public.
PDPL handling: board pack Annex 3 contains personal data (Mr. Yassin Al Hathmar — Emirates ID 7 8 4‑19 9 1‑0 0 2 3 4 5 6‑7; family origin: Al Hathmar; Trade Licence TL‑D I F C‑00 7 9 5 3); redact or pseudonymise before external circulation.
Chair approval and contact: H.E. Dr. Salma Al Hathmar will review the insider list daily; queries to dr.salma@dunespay.example or legal@dunespay.example.
Negative controls: no MAC has occurred under the Revolving Murabaha Facility; the “DunesPay Kiosk v2.1” product update and facilities maintenance logs are routine operational updates and not, on a standalone basis, material to the issuer.
Media and public references: “GulfTech Weekly” (10‑Apr‑2026) speculated on a fintech merger; do not comment—media speculation does not change non‑public status, and only ADX/SCA postings confer public status.
DIFC/ADGM nuance: if the target’s ADGM board approves a counter‑signing in‑principle, that remains non‑public unless disclosed on the ADGM Registrar portal; ensure any DIFC‑side professional advisers are bound by confidentiality.
Process hygiene: circulate draft SPA via the secure data room only; insert URL‑bound access keys (https://vdr.dunespay.example/deal?p=sandfalcon&inv=7a‑3f‑x9) rather than emailing attachments; maintain the MAR‑style insider list with timestamps.
Timing and escalation: if leakage is suspected, notify ADX Market Ops and SCA Market Supervision within one hour and consider a holding announcement; until an ADX bulletin appears, treat all deal terms and internal forecasts as MNPI.
